name: Sarah Huckabee Sanders
subject: re: confirming you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Governor |
body:
Your email has been confirmed. Everything we love about America and Arkansas is at stake, and with the radical left now in control of Washington we [](http://links.shsforgov.com/u/click?_t=1a739425fcea4563aabd0234355111c0&_m=3feeb0d3cd264abd900d24e4fd482e52&_e=13IYxOsKxGvvyRZOU6aeAfuZeokeEOdJP-q8t6_zziMR261u55JNIsVhxQsJRrF9qX3rDOsnXe54H5UVSocB39AQ0p_g2hVajd_9941si7h_bw4uEFb8PeOERBTLI3jmZ0_TL3zgwVkO0jrDpnvpUneIYNVjN5xnuedjMC54csS_lD5V59E7MBNqZCmJROWLfnb-Y2Mz3V4fmun3r_QbFocCj_07V87jR3XgNDh6DC0Gzn4A6BXE2MDUVxpSQ_wCm53XSIs13JUurEqOGYaU1KPG8sI7XAC2PjkimzFAjucpKbFui_s99McOwVim7k85hBbPJzmSU_GTvgnDRlLOuS2sg8PYjuQeG7wDL6CrAN2jlk7bgeTvOFcbK2LdN_oNDdLNwm8_fxkKSvDojsFslxR_ydyugimRPWW7NAJFEHaLErJoLDdxh0e9spnzdJJW) Peter, Thank you for signing up to stay in touch! _**Your email has been confirmed. **_ Let me tell you, I was proud to serve in President Trump’s Administration as we:
* _Confronted our most dangerous adversaries like China and North Korea. _
* _Ushered in an era of winning on tax cuts, the border, and judges._
* _And did it ALL under the stress of relentless attacks. _

_And now I am running for Governor to continue fighting for what we love about America! _ Our freedom and the rule of law are under attack. To remain free, we must have law and order and resolve our differences peacefully. The radical left’s “solution” is to impose government control and censorship from the top down. But their socialism and cancel culture will not heal America – it will only further divide and destroy us. And America’s governors are the last line of defense against their radicalism. That’s why I need patriots like you to chip in to my campaign as we work to save our country. **_By donating below, you are making an immediate contribution:_** [**ONE CLICK DONATE: frontlines of the fight. I’ve proven I can handle that. **Alongside President Trump, I took on the media, the radical left, and their cancel culture...and won!** Now I’m ready to win again, for freedom.**[ME TOO, CHIP IN NOW >>](http://links.shsforgov.com/u/click?_t=1a739425fcea4563aabd0234355111c0&_m=3feeb0d3cd264abd900d24e4fd482e52&_e=13IYxOsKxGvvyRZOU6aeAfuZeokeEOdJP-q8t6_zziMR261u55JNIsVhxQsJRrF9qX3rDOsnXe54H5UVSocB32ZA0AcVA7sxEwbxHmDsUGK9_puYHqkhKVEGZxxv9-XtJYudPr983pdYEZqQxMG7Ayl7TplxwIDsidblyWKH4qXzNLwH14YrE9-Imi0mFHugBlKcsxRo4V5QQ4ENi8-StO7LdWXV-y02uyNs-_moNuK-QNzQrdtIDRYNpLI53rQNC8q-8fnQPn6D6AMpLtEmRl0aIhh9pEg4UcHhPHKIn8LYebtMs81wHoHsW1sikNpY3ze8trujhX8sps5Qq-OXkUIiRuW6hvk5XTSPyoVU2Gw598ahTRop7iCjhpg7G70HCv-3JYiDdATkjC-xVwbxoSwCfR4tmv039Idr1ZrXP6sOV2n5BozBMdebbBeckxnB)** I will not be intimidated by the serious challenges we face. I will stand with our brave law enforcement officers and against sanctuary cities. I will protect small businesses from disastrous regulations, and fight radical environmental policies like the Green New Deal that threaten to destroy so many jobs. I will demand election integrity and ensure that every conservative has a voice. I am fighting for you... and I will not retreat, I will not surrender, and I will not bow down to the radical left. Not now. Not ever. I hope you’ll stand with me today by making a donation now:**[https://secure.winred.com/sarah-for-governor/action-126868/](http://links.shsforgov.com/u/click?_t=1a739425fcea4563aabd0234355111c0&_m=3feeb0d3cd264abd900d24e4fd482e52&_e=13IYxOsKxGvvyRZOU6aeAfuZeokeEOdJP-q8t6_zziMR261u55JNIsVhxQsJRrF9qX3rDOsnXe54H5UVSocB32ZA0AcVA7sxEwbxHmDsUGK9_puYHqkhKVEGZxxv9-XtJYudPr983pdYEZqQxMG7Ayl7TplxwIDsidblyWKH4qXzNLwH14YrE9-Imi0mFHugBlKcsxRo4V5QQ4ENi8-StO7LdWXV-y02uyNs-_moNuJ9GwYIz5-FSJBL1lLapc23vpiynEJ0dCcjplpwQcaQayx5gyLRfrTY7JkynmGJxfadhNTNHETknRKnd8OntC_44rKg3khRYYiIc94Hsu4jauhF1vgNKiUAIEOMkq4LfQB42LNhmYN4zPJ12p7VldzlQTP4LjsyfL8hCOvsuKewA4qcOGwrOalCm3JvQAEBQhpdgnmgiCPzllCdsxvvMhdU)** Thank you again for your support, Peter. Arkansas law limits contributions to $5,600 per election cycle. Each individual, political party committee, legislative caucus committee or approved political action committee may contribute up to $2,800 for the primary election and $2,800 for the general election -- for a total of $5,600.
Corporate contributions are not permissible.
Contributions are not tax deductible for Federal income tax purposes. Individuals may take a tax credit on Arkansas tax returns, up to a total of $50 per individual for political contributions made each year.
Contributions from foreign nationals are prohibited by law.
State law requires that we collect and report name, address, employer and occupation for each contributor.

name: PragerU
subject: How you can fight back against Big Tech
body: Dear Peter, Think of a country where a small group of people decide what is truth and what is fiction. This group isn't held accountable for its decisions. They get away with anything they like. Hiding behind giant media and tech companies, or corrupt third party "fact checkers," these mysterious people decide what you can see...what you can hear...and what you can say. This group of unknown people not only control the information you receive, but they routinely ruin people's social status and careers through censorship, cancellation, and slander-just by pressing a few buttons on a keyboard. I'm not talking about Russia. Or China. I'm talking about today's America and the power of Big Tech. DONATE NOW TO HELP PRAGERU FIGHT BIG TECH CENSORSHIP AND DEFEND FREE SPEECH ONLINE. http://email.granitelists.com/ct/57330185:sl_ow0KNK:m:3:1155937413:691349F343C53FFF47856644783BD670:r This is the kind of country we are about to live in-if we don't fight right now. It's now or never. Big Tech censorship is the greatest threat to Freedom of Speech in the history of the world. All other freedoms rely on our First Amendment rights. If we lose them, we lose everything. We routinely see leftist bias and outright lies completely unchallenged by Big Tech-while conservative voices are suppressed or canceled. PragerU is not taking this lying down. Here is what we are doing about it: - Educating millions about this grave threat, including a new documentary proving Big Tech bias, explaining how they censor, and exposing the danger of it - Battling Big Tech with lawsuits while fighting in the court of public opinion TO WAKE AMERICA UP - Building our distribution channels, like our free mobile app, to reach Americans directly - Growing grassroots programs, like PragerFORCE Students and Young Professionals and PragerU Resources for Educators and Parents (PREP), to get around censorship and make our voices heard The only way to win is by reaching, educating, and convincing enough young people to fight. There will be no freedom without Freedom of Speech. We need you to help us. Your tax-deductible gift is needed TODAY to defend Freedom of Speech. Please make a donation now to help us take on Big Tech. http://email.granitelists.com/ct/57330185:sl_ow0KNK:m:3:1155937413:691349F343C53FFF47856644783BD670:r We will fight for you-and for all Americans-to be able to see and hear what you choose, and say what you think. America as we know it depends on us winning this fight. We can't win without you, Marissa Streit CEO DONATE NOW http://email.granitelists.com/ct/57330185:sl_ow0KNK:m:3:1155937413:691349F343C53FFF47856644783BD670:r Copyright © 2021 PragerU, All rights reserved. This email was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com This email was sent by: Scott Walker Inc., Post Office Box 620437, Middleton, WI 53562 This message reflects the opinions and representations of PragerU. You are receiving this email because you signed up as a member of Scott Walker's online community. Click below if you would prefer to not receive future emails or advertisements from PragerU: https://email.granitelists.com/form/103832/10506/preferences/3?enc=sl_ow0KNK&eemail=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&mhash=ca2bba53cbfc24ba34df29ad09988fc2 Click here to unsubscribe.

name: Seth Moulton
subject: We must defeat Josh Hawley, Ted Cruz, and the Sedition Caucus
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/24248056/270102287/-631061264?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOTk0YmRmMi1lYzVmLWViMTEtYTYwNy0wMDE1NWQ0M2M5OTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BcJnh_iSmWYN9IQZ3EAN65kCo4Kx8z6HD31J7gLsYng=&emci=68c88581-d55f-eb11-a607-00155d43c992&emdi=d994bdf2-ec5f-eb11-a607-00155d43c992&ceid=194769) Friend, Serve America is devoted to supporting a new generation of service-oriented leaders who will put people over politics. In general, we raise for our candidates, rather than against their opponents. **But today, I’m doing something a little different—I’m launching an effort to defeat the so-called “Sedition Caucus,”** those Members who voted against certifying the results of the 2020 presidential election based on lies and conspiracy theories. I hope you’ll join me in this effort to hold these Members accountable at the ballot box. I also hope you’ll take a few minutes to read my thoughts on the importance of this accountability, below. [**Add your name today to join us in making a commitment to working together to defend democracy and hold the Sedition Caucus accountable at the ballot box.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/24248057/270102288/829835671?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOTk0YmRmMi1lYzVmLWViMTEtYTYwNy0wMDE1NWQ0M2M5OTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BcJnh_iSmWYN9IQZ3EAN65kCo4Kx8z6HD31J7gLsYng=&emci=68c88581-d55f-eb11-a607-00155d43c992&emdi=d994bdf2-ec5f-eb11-a607-00155d43c992&ceid=194769) _**Why we must defeat the Sedition Caucus**_ There is little that matters more to our democracy than the core tenets of free and fair elections and the peaceful transition of power. **We witnessed the resiliency of our democracy last week.** Despite the lies, conspiracy theories, and threats of another attack on the U.S. Capitol, Joe Biden and Kamala Harris took their oaths of office. Now, in the first week of their administration, we must hold accountable the Republicans in Congress who sought to undermine our free and fair elections. In their desperation to ride the coattails of Donald Trump—a political phenomenon that has turned our politics upside down in recent years—almost 150 Members of Congress voted against certifying the results of the 2020 presidential elections. Their vote was not based on any evidence of wrongdoing or fraud; it was simply a refusal to acknowledge that their preferred candidate lost, fair and square. The United States has some of the safest and most secure elections in the world. Trump’s own administration said that the 2020 election was “the most secure in history.” We have an extraordinary design of checks and balances that, although not without flaws, has allowed for the longest run of a democracy in human history. Our Constitution enables us to fight for change without the need for violence. It allows us to come together, as Americans, when we identify problems with our government and our society and to correct our nation’s course. That’s why our free and fair elections and the peaceful transition of power are so important. That’s why the siege on the U.S. Capitol earlier this month was an attack on American democracy itself. **And that’s why we’re launching a fund today to defeat those Members who perpetrated lies about election fraud and voted to ignore the will of the American voters—this “Sedition Caucus”—at the ballot box.** We must hold them accountable in the way that democracies do. “How could this happen?” so many people have asked me. The attack that left five dead and forced myself, my staff, and my colleagues to shelter in a secure room shocked the nation and the world. But this didn’t happen overnight. For two months, many of my Republican colleagues in the House and Senate have been lying to the American people. They failed to find the courage to stand up to Trump’s outrageous claim that the election was stolen from him, and they fed this lie to their supporters day in and day out. Drunk on lies and conspiracy theories, and whipped up by the President himself at a rally that day on the National Mall, they marched on the Capitol and wreaked havoc on a pillar of our government. Our democracy is bent but not broken. Our democracy is fickle but not fragile. It will endure—and America will endure. But only if we fight for it. We are going to show the Sedition Caucus that there is an electoral price to pay for refusing their sacred duty as leaders and legislators. We are going to hold them accountable for abusing the public’s trust. Please, commit today to joining us. In service, Seth clean_body: | | | Friend, Serve America is devoted to supporting a new generation of service-oriented leaders who will put people over politics. In general, we raise for our candidates, rather than against their opponents. But today, I’m doing something a little different—I’m launching an effort to defeat the so-called “Sedition Caucus,” those Members who voted against certifying the results of the 2020 presidential election based on lies and conspiracy theories. I hope you’ll join me in this effort to hold these Members accountable at the ballot box. I also hope you’ll take a few minutes to read my thoughts on the importance of this accountability, below. Why we must defeat the Sedition Caucus There is little that matters more to our democracy than the core tenets of free and fair elections and the peaceful transition of power. We witnessed the resiliency of our democracy last week. Despite the lies, conspiracy theories, and threats of another attack on the U.S. Capitol, Joe Biden and Kamala Harris took their oaths of office. Now, in the first week of their administration, we must hold accountable the Republicans in Congress who sought to undermine our free and fair elections. In their desperation to ride the coattails of Donald Trump—a political phenomenon that has turned our politics upside down in recent years—almost 150 Members of Congress voted against certifying the results of the 2020 presidential elections. Their vote was not based on any evidence of wrongdoing or fraud; it was simply a refusal to acknowledge that their preferred candidate lost, fair and square. The United States has some of the safest and most secure elections in the world. Trump’s own administration said that the 2020 election was “the most secure in history.” We have an extraordinary design of checks and balances that, although not without flaws, has allowed for the longest run of a democracy in human history. Our Constitution enables us to fight for change without the need for violence. It allows us to come together, as Americans, when we identify problems with our government and our society and to correct our nation’s course. That’s why our free and fair elections and the peaceful transition of power are so important. That’s why the siege on the U.S. Capitol earlier this month was an attack on American democracy itself. And that’s why we’re launching a fund today to defeat those Members who perpetrated lies about election fraud and voted to ignore the will of the American voters—this “Sedition Caucus”—at the ballot box. We must hold them accountable in the way that democracies do. “How could this happen?” so many people have asked me. The attack that left five dead and forced myself, my staff, and my colleagues to shelter in a secure room shocked the nation and the world. But this didn’t happen overnight. For two months, many of my Republican colleagues in the House and Senate have been lying to the American people. They failed to find the courage to stand up to Trump’s outrageous claim that the election was stolen from him, and they fed this lie to their supporters day in and day out. Drunk on lies and conspiracy theories, and whipped up by the President himself at a rally that day on the National Mall, they marched on the Capitol and wreaked havoc on a pillar of our government. Our democracy is bent but not broken. Our democracy is fickle but not fragile. It will endure—and America will endure. But only if we fight for it. We are going to show the Sedition Caucus that there is an electoral price to pay for refusing their sacred duty as leaders and legislators. We are going to hold them accountable for abusing the public’s trust. Please, commit today to joining us. In service, Seth = | | | | ---|---|---|--- If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please . | Paid for by Serve America PAC Serve America PAC PO Box 2013 Salem, MA 01970 United States

On Jan 21, 2021, at 5:06 PM, Roger Misso <roger@takingthehillpac.com> wrote:

Peter,

Each week, our messages make their way to the inboxes of thousands of people like you - supporters who believe in our mission to [support and elect veterans and military family members of integrity to Congress.](https://act.myngp.com/el/d_I-5WMT1qMM2ECx2lrDsYTChcS47myQqabqVh2loJA=/nurw4FMimMPdkVbTktI_KxDaXwmwMXSIunKQkdmB4mM=)

We don't like asking you for money. We don't like clogging up your inbox with yet another email. Trust me - _if we didn 't have to do it, we wouldn't do it!_ We aren't funded by corporations or special interest money; your contributions are the difference between our success and failure.

So here's the deal:[_**if half of the people who get this message chip in $10, we will be done fundraising FOR THE ENTIRE YEAR. And if we hit that goal, this will be the last fundraising email we send you this year.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/d_I-5WMT1qMM2ECx2lrDsYTChcS47myQqabqVh2loJA=/pJWctduIXBW_t-tH1trSarxS9efFdwJkR2sLECxTudQ=)

_**That 's a promise.**_

[_**Chip in now and help us end all these silly fundraising emails.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/d_I-5WMT1qMM2ECx2lrDsYTChcS47myQqabqVh2loJA=/pJWctduIXBW_t-tH1trSarxS9efFdwJkR2sLECxTudQ=) We appreciate your support as we help bring the next generation of servant leaders to Congress!

With honor,
Roger

Roger Misso
Executive Director
[Taking the Hill](https://act.myngp.com/el/d_I-5WMT1qMM2ECx2lrDsYTChcS47myQqabqVh2loJA=/KdLvf4F0TT1vrBXFDndDBMwl6EY1tXQn1PV0EfZvAVI=)
To make a contribution, [click here](https://act.myngp.com/el/d_I-5WMT1qMM2ECx2lrDsYTChcS47myQqabqVh2loJA=/_AoV-6s3bmVBcFej6maYU_dVMccLU8RTdUyEQ73rMVQ= "https://act.myngp.com/el/d_I-5WMT1qMM2ECx2lrDsYTChcS47myQqabqVh2loJA=/_AoV-6s3bmVBcFej6maYU_dVMccLU8RTdUyEQ73rMVQ=").

They 're counting on us. **](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001DPxN4G6gUgVkEMEV0_pI2V2NB8yKiEFVYBBu0SciYGsygwpZfI3HOS7Zx35k6haMkajfoGlwEtIPRxva6JguZYO1g0hraX7_5UGGuKVsyadyw3vi1a8TVA77uOfnc1QB5BE2uAI8BdaO3IkcQCxfZ0Glz9jjAVdvktnmsFYYnFR5P3wNSZ9LSJysi94Y5VSWzCJ5wEws1cLZIILH6cPuLGWnrixfk8N0T8jdIXWWz28PMU4Ua4eLgp131CgX1I59EJHWQite7cwCdMS2ZDOSgg3D-W2Qfk7xDfAWnRGMH3lJ2-RXHNaNxXwJXxVQsmDlnKC-gY-s1VseDth4clhm8WBf5dyNbFXbUSe0VSIUyKKrfArme43XhtjJSsfM6wcRyEQqaB6c7AdsVMYARFwCeQ==&c=jUL5-EmVZBEIgVAMDRgaCTkXFeOfrIVXjL8shVCqMgkudftj3XzEgw==&ch=0PaseuMubTlik3QvcV2fRWGNxZt5jeQsEtLzeo-9pcGIExquAJxt3A==)

We're now in _**YEAR EIGHT**_ of Northam-McAuliffe rule, and I want to talk about the systemic problems crippling Virginia: The systemic incompetence fueled by Ralph Northam, Terry McAuliffe, and the rest of the extremists in Richmond. I'm a proven job creator and innovator. My career has been about building businesses, creating new industries and disrupting the status quo. And given the mess we are in right now, that's exactly the type of attitude and leadership we need to get Virginia to lead again. The career politicians in Richmond called to defund our police, refused to take on rising violent crime, and destroyed our economy with their misguided shutdowns. I'm running to keep our streets safe, open our schools again, and support the heartbeat of our communities - small business. These extremists even passed massive tax hikes right in the middle of a pandemic while promising even more. That's just _insane_. The career politicians in Richmond refuse to let our children back in the classroom, even though the CDC says it's perfectly safe for schools to open. As your next Governor, **I WILL OPEN OUR SCHOOLS ON DAY ONE.** Friend, if you've had _ENOUGH_ of last eight years of Northam-McAuliffe rule, help me bring the change we need. It's time to turn **VIRGINIA RED AGAIN**! clean_body: Will you join my team? &zwnj == == == Friend, Today I'm taking a BIG STEP , and I want you to be the first to know: I 'm running for Governor of Virginia. We're now in YEAR EIGHT of Northam-McAuliffe rule, and I want to talk about the systemic problems crippling Virginia: The systemic incompetence fueled by Ralph Northam, Terry McAuliffe, and the rest of the extremists in Richmond. I'm a proven job creator and innovator. My career has been about building businesses, creating new industries and disrupting the status quo. And given the mess we are in right now, that's exactly the type of attitude and leadership we need to get Virginia to lead again. The career politicians in Richmond called to defund our police, refused to take on rising violent crime, and destroyed our economy with their misguided shutdowns. I'm running to keep our streets safe, open our schools again, and support the heartbeat of our communities - small business. These extremists even passed massive tax hikes right in the middle of a pandemic while promising even more. That's just insane. The career politicians in Richmond refuse to let our children back in the classroom, even though the CDC says it's perfectly safe for schools to open. As your next Governor, I WILL OPEN OUR SCHOOLS ON DAY ONE. Friend, if you've had ENOUGH of last eight years of Northam-McAuliffe rule, help me bring the change we need. It's time to turn VIRGINIA RED AGAIN! == == == == == == == == Thank you for your support, Pete Snyder | Get involved with Team Snyder today! Follow us on == and ==. == PAID FOR BY PETE FOR GOVERNOR PO BOX 26141, Alexandria, VA 22313 == | | PETE FOR GOVERNOR | PO Box 26141, Alexandria, VA 22313 | | Sent by mailto:action@standupforliberty.net powered by

What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)?
The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. We're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. Following a historically successful 2020 election cycle, state Republicans currently hold 62 of 99 state legislative chambers, 25 of 45 lieutenant governor seats, 28 of 50 secretary of state offices, and 11 of 12 independently-elected agriculture officials -- thanks in large part to the support from patriots like you. You can learn more about us at [rslc.gop](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001HYC39C-8_IQ3ryBG_6q31oVnA0z5-1YejGL3kFq3nfXWGkU9n8B-M0CgIEqoLRrHiAelTsv4mtUAAWtcPua8O-dR2H1Czk5rhDoukDtMeix0W1fjjTi3f0BaTQdTt83ITIIPx0yztyc=&c=J4ziJjZgn4g3tbB6SSjHS0bsgHJs7zpAF0hWEiGfByMtY1F_s_nXhA==&ch=0zD4B6pzTrUlMsmvESFVLv6HynrUlHEkS5mbqEqCxmkuBIi108k-gw==).

body:
We wanted to quickly reach out to you today to lock in your responses regarding your top priorities for Senate Republicans in 2021. This short survey will allow Senate Republicans like Todd Young (R-IN) to know what's most important to you.
Friend,

We wanted to quickly reach out to you today to lock in your responses regarding your top priorities for Senate Republicans in 2021. This short survey will allow Senate Republicans like Todd Young (R-IN) to know what's most important to you.

We're collecting responses until MIDNIGHT tonight to ensure we can start this new legislative session, dealing with the issues that mean the most to YOU.

[**TAKE THE SURVEY**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001AfPI44P4VhFHzzk0xJw9GGt0ZpD_O_deCVPkjFVAwfMTv09C4nHWE_iEU6-83BvSzaTPnkpXgmyIlWx4EvuZrLVwWtTFD_7Tf-F7am4Wu53SmRRg8x9M7DL_c4wRmMS0gNjkSJ_xTUXeeAD92EZ6rw04WeTvbscIzofwX6UQUR3BXT8Uqs9ySb22Q8Chl6S2DCUBo34IJfccxRXmEX1QIj1dsJcVWHiTKxUXv4lMWvVXO1LOtaQ1qInktrcX5Qo2kC8xUOw4cFT4AXJweSgE56YUkP8PS2B5TzbMdfR103Ov8t_TX5d1OULHB64s2VjCr98NCQzklaSuNlpejM3HPSMM5X_1AjWPOykHJhrXoMS9Qj90xLazSB2KJkse8WPWg-mIKnEV0hcg1KbVfy9gxw==&c=VCwLnfsXxYofui3uuk2cJjKSZExYVyYI_wEmMkGRASV8sHThPTZ9aQ==&ch=Zt5ZXu2CeY0fdHdUDNkb-_-wqpgK18I0T-r4Ne-g7mLoe9dRsfs-OQ==)

Hoosier Republican,

The radical left now controls the White House, the Senate, and the House, and over the course of just DAYS, we’ve seen what they’re capable of doing.

Moments after being sworn in as president, Joe Biden weakened our borders, killed thousands of jobs by cancelling the Keystone XL pipeline, approved taxpayer-funded abortions, and banned fracking (after he said he wouldn’t during the campaign) which will eventually raise gas prices on Hoosiers. And we know he, Pelosi, Schumer, and the Squad are just getting started.

In fact, Joe Biden issued 30 executive orders in just his first three days.

There is no doubt that we need to start preparing for the battle to come in 2022 to take back Congress!

Will you chip in right now to help us re-build our war chest to take back our Senate and House majority? Our first end-of-month deadline of 2021 is FAST approaching, and we want to make a huge showing of support for the GOP!
CHIP IN NOW! >> (https://secure.winred.com/indiana-republican-party/pg-ingop-e-eom1-012521?utm_source=HouseFile&utm_campaign=ingop&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=pg_ingop_e_eom1_012521&utm_agency=alpha&mc_cid=9224390712&mc_eid=UNIQID)

We cannot allow the Democrats to fundamentally transform everything that makes America great. We need to protect our freedoms and liberties, and make sure that we can keep the American Dream alive for generations to come.

Thanks for your help,
Kyle Hupfer, IN GOP Chairman

name: Finance Alerts via Team RonJon
subject: Democrats are WAY ahead
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY RON JOHNSON FOR SENATE, INC
body:
Friend, we'll keep this short.

name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: Are We Finally Going to End Walz' Power?
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=vote_coming_up_retar&n=1)
---
Peter \-- **How much does the closure of bars, restaurants, gyms, schools and youth sports affect you?** If you asked most Minnesotans that question, you'd understand why there is a growing list of people in this state fed up with Governor Walz' Emergency Powers. And even some in the mainstream media are starting to take notice. In an interview with Channel 6 News a week ago, Governor Walz told reporter Betsy Singer: _If we just have one person telling us what to do, we wouldn't have to have all these heartfelt disagreements. But I just hope we can reestablish this sense of decorum, and decency, and civility, that has always been a hallmark of America's democracy._ **Democracy?! What democracy? There's nothing more anti-democracy than a Governor creating unilateral laws that are destroying businesses and harming Minnesotans!** I think Betsy was so shocked that he said that, she did something the rest of the mainstream media won't do - allow the opposing viewpoint. Channel 6 was willing to allow our voice to be heard on tv. Here's my interview: [](https://www.action4liberty.com/our_response_to_governor_walz_on_channel_6?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=vote_coming_up_retar&n=2) You see, Chapter 12 Emergency Powers laws were not written to allow a Governor to declare an indefinite "emergency" so he can rule by himself, without the Legislature. Walz has essentially eliminated the relevancy of the legislative branch of our Republic.
## And the courts, media and ruling elite have allowed it to happen for 11 months!
But everyday Governor Walz' unchecked, unilateral powers continue and our beloved small businesses fail, more people are waking up to what is happening to our state and country. We continue to grow in strength and power on a daily basis. **Which is why I'm happy to announce that another vote to End Walz' Emergency Powers will be coming up this Thursday thanks to liberty champion, Representative Erik Mortensen. While they're busy going to crony special interest groups and big corporations for money, we go directly to you. Help us continue fighting against them with a donation today.** | [](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_end_walz_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=vote_coming_up_retar&n=4 "Support Our Pressure Campaign") [Support Our Pressure Campaign](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_end_walz_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=vote_coming_up_retar&n=5)

And I mean it. We've been building resources for this fight and we know **[YOU will keep helping us out](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_end_walz_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=vote_coming_up_retar&n=6)** until we finally win and End Walz' Emergency Powers once and for all.

clean_body: | Peter \-- How much does the closure of bars, restaurants, gyms, schools and youth sports affect you? If you asked most Minnesotans that question, you'd understand why there is a growing list of people in this state fed up with Governor Walz' Emergency Powers. And even some in the mainstream media are starting to take notice. In an interview with Channel 6 News a week ago, Governor Walz told reporter Betsy Singer: If we just have one person telling us what to do, we wouldn't have to have all these heartfelt disagreements. But I just hope we can reestablish this sense of decorum, and decency, and civility, that has always been a hallmark of America's democracy. Democracy?! What democracy? There's nothing more anti-democracy than a Governor creating unilateral laws that are destroying businesses and harming Minnesotans! I think Betsy was so shocked that he said that, she did something the rest of the mainstream media won't do - allow the opposing viewpoint. Channel 6 was willing to allow our voice to be heard on tv. Here's my interview: You see, Chapter 12 Emergency Powers laws were not written to allow a Governor to declare an indefinite "emergency" so he can rule by himself, without the Legislature. Walz has essentially eliminated the relevancy of the legislative branch of our Republic. And the courts, media and ruling elite have allowed it to happen for 11 months! We need your help to prevent Joe Biden and the Democrats from doing irreparable damage to our Republic. Peter,

The Democrats spent four years trying to stop President Trump from getting anything accomplished for the American people.

President Trump promised and delivered:
* A border wall
* An America-first immigration policy
* Elimination of radical, job killing environmental policies

**In just one day and with the stroke of a pen** , Joe Biden unilaterally decided to overturn all of it. That’s right, Wednesday evening, Biden signed 17 executive orders to overturn four years of Conservative change that we fought so hard to get.

This is just the beginning: **in the coming weeks expect more executive orders, government madidates, economy crushing shutdowns, government spending increases and more.**

I’m writing today because **[we must start now to win a Conservative majority in Congress](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=e168187401e7411485f91e51a42112cc&_e=ZMRrD388p9To14h6CLzclv3xzuq0z21RSE7YZQy9LW6Rn7ojZm-FzKKpcB5hj-jcFC9LUGa9vzu98tq3zQ2Cr1hRKR301Cq1kbB3x4BLv484KGGWCIf5666qHeYEDBxfyqlS_ePuIQlAKOOCQSBPxplMlvAl3RX6Tbri3HASFJqjLMhwl512mTZyFdCay4P3HnKwWibJ03oNzlRZg3OKXx853SiuCNHU4X4xI9vjPa-pmN2T8wXQN9g3iG2-DhGX7Wc0z_Gl74rFqZ0Pf4S_Qp3GjCcH-7msKan6X_M0fvjGpxDY3jgnw3FlDYCdUOUPSVenKHSviQQk54m7O8FYtW2w5SG8mB_1hW0ksMFRiKe_KgAQckE0sbkU2g2hG0m33Xp1vvn4hIgUJxa5kzi01Cr6f2x_xxvdqRbtHPvm1GGAIW4E0s2KTTjVXpUY7uTp)**. We only need a few more Conservatives in Congress to put the Democrats in the minority and have the ability to prevent the Democrat administration from doing more damage to our nation.

Retiring Nancy Pelosi as Speaker and uniting all Conservatives to stop radical legislation from Joe Biden and the far left begins today. **[Will you join our cause? ](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=e168187401e7411485f91e51a42112cc&_e=ZMRrD388p9To14h6CLzclv3xzuq0z21RSE7YZQy9LW6Rn7ojZm-FzKKpcB5hj-jcFC9LUGa9vzu98tq3zQ2Cr1hRKR301Cq1kbB3x4BLv484KGGWCIf5666qHeYEDBxfyqlS_ePuIQlAKOOCQSBPxplMlvAl3RX6Tbri3HASFJqjLMhwl512mTZyFdCay4P3HnKwWibJ03oNzlRZg3OKXx853SiuCNHU4X4xI9vjPa9D0sUxpuY2OWRWUyu5jkuQq1fR03oQUVheJnWdPK37MP4hT7E5WTwsIQ9ygCmNjXbBYuWxVDKdbOS9ODJeXOptPgy2wiexnJQNDzmUst3TVca_51BQ0YSQ92FGdJ4rmVUrX9Nqqd5P533bmUPD7_Xzt9S40sgzBOezeY0ySraQtWHPn1s0XGEqYobHYr-h0iHQyxXlbHm0f-LKZv8bBAEc)**

clean_body: We need your help to prevent Joe Biden and the Democrats from doing irreparable damage to our Republic. We have to make up some major ground this weekend and it's paramount we have your buy-in Don't want to receive our emails? | Peter, The Democrats spent four years trying to stop President Trump from getting anything accomplished for the American people. President Trump promised and delivered: A border wall An America-first immigration policy Elimination of radical, job killing environmental policies In just one day and with the stroke of a pen , Joe Biden unilaterally decided to overturn all of it. That’s right, Wednesday evening, Biden signed 17 executive orders to overturn four years of Conservative change that we fought so hard to get. This is just the beginning: in the coming weeks expect more executive orders, government madidates, economy crushing shutdowns, government spending increases and more. I’m writing today because . We only need a few more Conservatives in Congress to put the Democrats in the minority and have the ability to prevent the Democrat administration from doing more damage to our nation. Retiring Nancy Pelosi as Speaker and uniting all Conservatives to stop radical legislation from Joe Biden and the far left begins today. | We need to know that our team is ready to take back the majority – The American people made it clear in November’s election – they elected Conservatives in nearly every close House race in the country. Now we must expand the map and take back the majority. ** Thank you for your support. For freedom, Jim Jordan | Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress PO BOX 355 Delaware, OH 43015

name: Newt Gingrich
subject: Help flip the Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
n
The current Democrat leadership is going to do whatever it takes to raise your taxes, grant citizenship to millions of people in the country illegally, and allow China to do as it pleases. Simply put, this would absolutely destroy our nation, which is why we must FLIP THE SENATE in 2022.
Friend,

With President Joe Biden, Vice President Kamala Harris, Senate Majority Leader Chuck Schumer, and Speaker of the House Nancy Pelosi dictating the agenda, it is more important than ever that we win back the Senate in 2022 - and our fight begins TODAY.
****[DONATE>> 4X-MATCH](https://secure.winred.com/nrsc/newt-gingrich?sc=pem51041m13m&utm_campaign=20210126_TY.100609_newt-gingrich_t1046574-575&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TY.100609&utm_content=20210126_help-flip-the-senate-first-name)****
---

The current Democrat leadership is going to do whatever it takes to raise your taxes, grant citizenship to millions of people in the country illegally, and allow China to do as it pleases. Simply put, this would absolutely destroy our nation, which is why _we must[**FLIP THE SENATE**](https://secure.winred.com/nrsc/newt-gingrich?sc=pem51041m13m&utm_campaign=20210126_TY.100609_newt-gingrich_t1046574-575&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TY.100609&utm_content=20210126_help-flip-the-senate-first-name)_[](https://secure.winred.com/nrsc/newt-gingrich?sc=pem51041m13m&utm_campaign=20210126_TY.100609_newt-gingrich_t1046574-575&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TY.100609&utm_content=20210126_help-flip-the-senate-first-name) in 2022.

The Left now has control of our ENTIRE government and they want nothing more than to destroy all of the progress we have made in the past four years. **We can 't afford for this to happen.**

****[CHIP IN TO FLIP THE SENATE](https://secure.winred.com/nrsc/newt-gingrich?sc=pem51041m13m&utm_campaign=20210126_TY.100609_newt-gingrich_t1046574-575&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TY.100609&utm_content=20210126_help-flip-the-senate-first-name)****
---

The fight for the Senate Majority is now, and we need all hands on deck to do so. [**Please chip in $100, $50, or even just $10 TODAY to help Republicans start off strong.**](https://secure.winred.com/nrsc/newt-gingrich?sc=pem51041m13m&utm_campaign=20210126_TY.100609_newt-gingrich_t1046574-575&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TY.100609&utm_content=20210126_help-flip-the-senate-first-name)

I know you won't let me down,

Newt Gingrich

**[**DONATE >> 4X-MATCH **](https://secure.winred.com/nrsc/newt-gingrich?sc=pem51041m13m&utm_campaign=20210126_TY.100609_newt-gingrich_t1046574-575&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TY.100609&utm_content=20210126_help-flip-the-senate-first-name)**

name: Tim Scott
subject: Don't let the media ignore my story
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR SENATE
body:
Friend,

Over the past several weeks, I have seen story after story praising the historic nature of the election of a Black Senator in Georgia. While this is a significant achievement for the Democrat Party, _**why has the media continued to ignore my story?**_
**
They don 't want to hear about me becoming the first Black Republican Senator elected in the South since Reconstruction.**

The liberal media has always tried to silence my voice. A Black conservative from South Carolina does not fit the narrative the media tries to create about the Republican Party.

They don't want to acknowledge the uniquely American journey of my family -- from cotton to Congress in one lifetime.

They don't want you to hear my story of growing up in a single parent household and nearly failing out of high school, but rising above it to find success.

**[](https://secure.winred.com/tim-scott-for-senate/media-my-story/?utm_campaign=20210126_TY.100609_tim-scott_t1046619-1260&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TY.100609&utm_content=20210126_dont-let-the-media-ignore-my-story/)**
**[Friend, I am personally reaching out today -- asking you to be part of my team so that together we can share a positive message of conservative values.](https://secure.winred.com/tim-scott-for-senate/media-my-story/?utm_campaign=20210126_TY.100609_tim-scott_t1046619-1260&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TY.100609&utm_content=20210126_dont-let-the-media-ignore-my-story/)**
[STAND WITH ME](https://secure.winred.com/tim-scott-for-senate/media-my-story/?utm_campaign=20210126_TY.100609_tim-scott_t1046619-1260&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TY.100609&utm_content=20210126_dont-let-the-media-ignore-my-story/)
---

Now is not the time to sit on the sidelines and allow my voice and story to be silenced. I am counting on you.

I need you to join my team by chipping in whatever you can afford to help ensure our positive message is heard all across America.
[STAND WITH ME](https://secure.winred.com/tim-scott-for-senate/media-my-story/?utm_campaign=20210126_TY.100609_tim-scott_t1046619-1260&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TY.100609&utm_content=20210126_dont-let-the-media-ignore-my-story/)
---

Tim Scott

name: Congressman Jeff Van Drew
subject: Will you join my fight, Friend?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Drew for Congress

I have some breaking news that I wanted to come to you with first... before anyone else. After receiving the support of nearly 182,000 Pennsylvanians. Peter, I have some breaking news that I wanted to come to you with first... before anyone else. After receiving the support of nearly 182,000 Pennsylvanians, I promised to continue fighting to ensure they had a voice representing them in Congress. **And today, Peter, I took the next step in that fight by filing my paperwork with the Federal Elections Commission to run for Congress in 2022.** I will travel across our community over the coming months to hear from Pennsylvanians and will have a more formal announcement in the summer.

Fellow Conservative,

The Democrats spent four years trying to stop President Trump from getting anything accomplished for the American people.

President Trump promised and delivered:
* A border wall
* An America-first immigration policy
* Elimination of radical, job killing environmental policies

**In just one day and with the stroke of a pen** , Joe Biden unilaterally decided to overturn all of it. That’s right, Wednesday evening, Biden signed 17 executive orders to overturn four years of Conservative change that we fought so hard to get.

This is just the beginning: **in the coming weeks expect more executive orders, government madidates, economy crushing shutdowns, government spending increases and more.**

Senator Rubio joined _**Fox News Sunday 's**_ Chris Wallace to discuss impeachment. This is what he had to say: _**" Well, first of all, I think the trial is stupid. I think it's counterproductive. We already have a flaming fire in this country and it's like taking a bunch of gasoline and pouring it on top of the fire."**_
**-Senator Marco Rubio** Friend, this impeachment trial is politics for the sake of politics.

Not only is the impeachment trial counterproductive, but it also takes our attention away from the matters at hand. Senator Rubio is focused on getting more relief to families and small businesses across the country who are still struggling during this pandemic. This trial is detrimental to our country and will only result in wasted time and more division.

Friend, you know where Senator Rubio stands on the issue, but we want to hear from you. _**[Should the Senate move forward with an impeachment trial of President Trump?](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001TZH88HW0V324l48R8DcA9PoYecrHB9CxomrWMmMsEdGRrLkRChE_zucoRFEt_pLuP_JBcx6eM9rapatNEe5z-8-9s_jxW3PeXcj0l2SkWeh8GFCC9Deak42lp8hc2X7xBhQgAsj9WqmqNFBzqANgy6KglK3PATC6cb-DU03xXAAIWzhmKIRX8tfV3qEFzd-9Thx3uLGaB9l9udLaVj2dS1yKtmN0TcS_6VBZo_DoEnK1zFHM_zhXRiI01_6jO2l8pkxaxM8qNRqOfjE5FcPBULoOgZvnOiBa2IxBviedoIk1tQuxncF1zjCO4umN5-Bgd_drd0YuJ9Bua49Cteobat5B7ZxI7XnAQaGPqtycg-ovb_cwVvllhUCtqebaSIMu1c8YZiLhX7YhPRCMFa_WuJhcjjAmF749dYT8t04_jKxOOFxWunNzYK1okWGVfj1JGS9Q_9zu7AY=&c=yMyHjTp0AkjCy1jBcXBm1xqPAhgljZ6Up8bTWhtEIs5m9sasycBJjg==&ch=P5aUbwJY6PdzkpMP0F5W77ladqLv_V7GiRqVQ6y5NmeVkjZ_rPP_zQ== Did you hear? Our campaign just got a major endorsement from President Donald J. Trump.

Here’s what the President had to say about Sarah and our campaign:

_“Sarah Huckabee Sanders is a warrior who will always fight for the people of Arkansas and do what is right, not what is politically correct. Sarah is strong on Borders, tough on Crime, and fully supports the Second Amendment and our great law enforcement officers.”_

_“She loves our Military and Veterans - and her home state of Arkansas. Sarah will be a GREAT GOVERNOR, and she has my Complete and Total Endorsement!”_

Arkansas law limits contributions to $5,600 per election cycle. Each individual, political party committee, legislative caucus committee or approved political action committee may contribute up to $2,800 for the primary election and $2,800 for the general election -- for a total of $5,600.
Corporate contributions are not permissible.
Contributions are not tax deductible for Federal income tax purposes. Individuals may take a tax credit on Arkansas tax returns, up to a total of $50 per individual for political contributions made each year.
Contributions from foreign nationals are prohibited by law.
State law requires that we collect and report name, address, employer and occupation for each contributor.

State law requires that we collect and report name, address, employer and occupation for each contributor.

name: Matt Gaetz
subject: RINOs like Liz Cheney have to go
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ
body:
---
| | | | | | [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ELbWoe9pIh4CKmdwGfQSgvjWbetmAvEQmm3C94Qfs5PErK6fPJR1ch1sfD5j6hRYePPjtekt0vF-DX-r2FBXIvWjgs7gridxIsmHBH9pTXHseMjZ_VsS0VV7RVpDlmQfvxx45WXac8fwj9x0sgnKyWZs6GuKfircobvhrioNkS4R7WdHA33uBg==&c=hxgXMKE_N1GwhUAdQmaB5jHsGOnIREJrydYPe5MUqU3-vgJwlH4seA==&ch=i8HFuKpYrz8EZEKwR2tYo31N_JrC_4_S7m0yV6H-BlNB4tJVqaBZgA==)
---
| Patriot,
Donald Trump transformed the Republican Party, from one that favored the Swamp in D.C. to one that works for the American people. The America-First Movement has taken off because it's what our citizens want: for the government to put AMERICANS FIRST.
Liz Cheney, who is the current Republican Conference Chairwoman and the 3rd ranking Republican in Congress, crossed the line when she went along with the spiteful Democrats and voted to impeach President Trump. She clearly does not represent the 74 million Americans who support a leader that takes on the Swamp, rather than swims in it.
---
| | | [REPLACE THE RINOS](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ELbWoe9pIh4CKmdwGfQSgvjWbetmAvEQmm3C94Qfs5PErK6fPJR1ch1sfD5j6hRYePPjtekt0vF-DX-r2FBXIvWjgs7gridxIsmHBH9pTXHseMjZ_VsS0VV7RVpDlmQfvxx45WXac8fwj9x0sgnKyWZs6GuKfircobvhrioNkS4R7WdHA33uBg==&c=hxgXMKE_N1GwhUAdQmaB5jHsGOnIREJrydYPe5MUqU3-vgJwlH4seA==&ch=i8HFuKpYrz8EZEKwR2tYo31N_JrC_4_S7m0yV6H-BlNB4tJVqaBZgA==)
---
| | | [PUT AMERICA FIRST](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ELbWoe9pIh4CKmdwGfQSgvjWbetmAvEQmm3C94Qfs5PErK6fPJR1ch1sfD5j6hRYePPjtekt0vF-DX-r2FBXIvWjgs7gridxIsmHBH9pTXHseMjZ_VsS0VV7RVpDlmQfvxx45WXac8fwj9x0sgnKyWZs6GuKfircobvhrioNkS4R7WdHA33uBg==&c=hxgXMKE_N1GwhUAdQmaB5jHsGOnIREJrydYPe5MUqU3-vgJwlH4seA==&ch=i8HFuKpYrz8EZEKwR2tYo31N_JrC_4_S7m0yV6H-BlNB4tJVqaBZgA==)
---
| I'm leading an effort to oust Liz Cheney from Republican leadership and replace other RINOs in our conference who refuse to represent the will of everyday Americans. We need to act now if we are going to save the Republican Party, but I'm going to need your support.
I explain why Cheney has to go on this Hannity segment:
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ELbWoe9pIh4CKmdwGfQSgvjWbetmAvEQmm3C94Qfs5PErK6fPJR1ch1sfD5j6hRYePPjtekt0vF-DX-r2FBXIvWjgs7gridxIsmHBH9pTXHseMjZ_VsS0VV7RVpDlmQfvxx45WXac8fwj9x0sgnKyWZs6GuKfircobvhrioNkS4R7WdHA33uBg==&c=hxgXMKE_N1GwhUAdQmaB5jHsGOnIREJrydYPe5MUqU3-vgJwlH4seA==&ch=i8HFuKpYrz8EZEKwR2tYo31N_JrC_4_S7m0yV6H-BlNB4tJVqaBZgA==)
---
| This is our one chance to take back our Party from the RINOs and the Swamp. If we don't act now, we'll be stuck with people like Liz Cheney and Mitt Romney calling the shots. If you are a TRUMP REPUBLICAN like I am, you need to [stand with me](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ELbWoe9pIh4CKmdwGfQSgvjWbetmAvEQmm3C94Qfs5PErK6fPJR1ch1sfD5j6hRYePPjtekt0vF-DX-r2FBXIvWjgs7gridxIsmHBH9pTXHseMjZ_VsS0VV7RVpDlmQfvxx45WXac8fwj9x0sgnKyWZs6GuKfircobvhrioNkS4R7WdHA33uBg==&c=hxgXMKE_N1GwhUAdQmaB5jHsGOnIREJrydYPe5MUqU3-vgJwlH4seA==&ch=i8HFuKpYrz8EZEKwR2tYo31N_JrC_4_S7m0yV6H-BlNB4tJVqaBZgA==) before it's too late.

subject: Time to Raise the Minimum Wage
body:
Fortune 500 CEOs are paid from double to 5,000 times more than their employees - We can change that. | | | | [ ](https://workingheroaction.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b9ad2d62186ec9f0550f272d0&id=0a613daa31&e=81c1acb158)
---
| [HOME](https://workingheroaction.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b9ad2d62186ec9f0550f272d0&id=69da908f18&e=81c1acb158) | [O](https://workingheroaction.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b9ad2d62186ec9f0550f272d0&id=ca233aecf8&e=81c1acb158)[UR MISSION](https://workingheroaction.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b9ad2d62186ec9f0550f272d0&id=3387db3307&e=81c1acb158) | [WHO'S ELIGIBLE?](https://workingheroaction.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b9ad2d62186ec9f0550f272d0&id=cc8d5d3d0d&e=81c1acb158) | [ABOUT](https://workingheroaction.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b9ad2d62186ec9f0550f272d0&id=af6587069d&e=81c1acb158) | [TAKE ACTION](https://workingheroaction.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b9ad2d62186ec9f0550f272d0&id=46e0b988ec&e=81c1acb158)** | **** ****[DONATE ](https://workingheroaction.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b9ad2d62186ec9f0550f272d0&id=8c43341fe3&e=81c1acb158) **
---
| | |
---
| **Essential Workers Deserve Better**
---
| [ ](https://workingheroaction.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b9ad2d62186ec9f0550f272d0&id=d2692ffd66&e=81c1acb158 "Joe Sanberg")
---
Our founder Joe Sanberg is featured in [this article](https://workingheroaction.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b9ad2d62186ec9f0550f272d0&id=92653929ec&e=81c1acb158) from Business Insider about the need to raise wages in proportion with productivity.
| Raising the minimum wage will **close the gap between workers and the executives. We can not assume it will happen on its own. **Before the pandemic, 8 out of 10 Americans were living paycheck to paycheck. Now that number is even higher. This is a national emergency.

**Who would benefit from raising the wage? **We all call nursing assistants and orderlies heroes these days. Their median hourly wage is $14.25. Home health aides caring for our loved ones make $11.63/hr on median. The person who serves you food often can't afford that food themselves. You all know someone who would benefit and is deserving.

Our federal minimum wage ($7.25/hr) is pathetically low and hasn’t increased in 11 years. **If it had grown with productivity since 1960 it would be $22.50 now.** Why should C-suite execs get rewarded for productivity and not the workers?
---
We must protect all Americans during this pandemic, both medically and financially. Those who still have jobs and show up to do them - at great risk to themselves - should be able to afford life’s basic needs. **This shouldn’t be controversial.** Plus, it’s good for the wider economy.

**When workers earn more, they spend more.** That generates more sales for companies, which means they become more valuable. So while CEOs will get a smaller piece of the pie than usual, the pie itself will be bigger. Everyone wins.

So far, we've been able to begin our journey; make the initial impact to be seen and heard. **But with a $23 donation from you, we can continue building the resources to educate our elected leaders, and ultimately help our Heroes get the $23/hour they deserve.**

Find inspiration in the many leaders in the fight to #EndPoverty in **[this article](http://) >**
---
|
---
| [DONATE $23 TODAY](https://workingheroaction.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b9ad2d62186ec9f0550f272d0&id=57c44eeb5a&e=81c1acb158 "Help raise minimum wage")
---
|
---
| [ ](https://workingheroaction.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b9ad2d62186ec9f0550f272d0&id=85c29c76f7&e=81c1acb158)
---
We are thrilled that Ronald Klain, President Biden's Chief of Staff retweeted our call for $23/hour minimum wage.
|
---
| [DONATE $23 TODAY](https://workingheroaction.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b9ad2d62186ec9f0550f272d0&id=5bd686e752&e=81c1acb158 "Donate $23 Today")

---

name: John Fetterman
subject: I want to hear where you're at re: raising the minimum wage to at least $15 an hour, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
The same politicians blocking a $15 per hour minimum wage are waiting on the other side to shame you for needing assistance simply to eat.
#
All work has dignity, Peter. All paychecks must, too.
**That’s why, as a U.S. Senator, I’d fight to raise the national minimum wage to at least $15 an hour. ✊**
The minimum wage wage in Pennsylvania hasn’t been raised in *more* than a decade. It’s time we stop pretending we’re saving money or jobs by paying starvation wages. It’s mathematically impossible to live on minimum wage, and we all end up making up the difference as a society in the form of public assistance, crime, health care — you name it.
**As I strongly consider a run for Senate, it’s important to me to hear exactly where folks like you are on huge issues such as raising the minimum wage.**[So add your name if you agree: We’ve got to raise the national minimum wage to at least $15 an hour to make sure that every person can live and work with dignity.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/jf-15-min-wage-20210126/?source=em20210126-65&t=1&akid=65%2E434096%2Ev3qYSN)
**[Sign your name](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/jf-15-min-wage-20210126/?source=em20210126-65&t=2&akid=65%2E434096%2Ev3qYSN)**
For people trying to stay above water, the $7.25 minimum wage in Pennsylvania just isn’t enough to get by. Not even close. **So why pretend it’s nothing more than an anchor to poverty, despair + dependence? 🤔**
The truth is that the same politicians blocking a $15 per hour minimum wage are waiting on the other side to shame you for needing assistance simply to eat. Because the minimum wage is just *that* shitty.
**I think it’s high time for us to take on this issue the right way by raising the national minimum wage to at least $15 an hour.** But I realize this campaign has never just been about me. That’s why I want to know where you’re at, Peter.
[Sign your name here if you’re with me in the fight for a livable wage. Because all work has dignity, and all paychecks must, too.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/jf-15-min-wage-20210126/?source=em20210126-65&t=3&akid=65%2E434096%2Ev3qYSN)
Thanks for your input,
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania
P.S. Look, Peter: I believe that no one who is working 40-plus hours a week should live in poverty in America – and the majority agrees: 67% of Americans support raising the minimum wage to $15 an hour. [If you’re among them, let me know by adding your name to our petition in support of raising the national minimum wage to at least $15 an hour.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/jf-15-min-wage-20210126/?source=em20210126-65&t=4&akid=65%2E434096%2Ev3qYSN)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20210126-65-footer&t=5&refcode2=65_434096_v3qYSN&akid=65%2E434096%2Ev3qYSN)**
---

Paid for by Fetterman for PA

But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=6&akid=65%2E434096%2Ev3qYSN).
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
Mail us: Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211

name: Team Evergreen
subject: Our friend Maggie is going to the White House
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
body:
Did you hear the news?
| [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/379?t=3&akid=6246%2E53494%2EzwlJwS) Friend, Did you hear the news? Evergreen Action Political Director Maggie Thomas has been named chief of staff for the new White House Office of Domestic Climate Policy! There's no doubt: President Biden sure knows how to pick a good team. **[Want to share your excitement? Sign a card congratulating Evergreen's own Maggie Thomas today!](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/1559?t=4&akid=6246%2E53494%2EzwlJwS)** [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/1559?t=5&akid=6246%2E53494%2EzwlJwS) In her new role, Maggie and the new White House climate team will coordinate the work of federal agencies and directly facilitate an all-out national mobilization to defeat the climate crisis and build a new clean energy economy. We will miss Maggie at Evergreen, but we look forward to seeing her help President Biden implement the bold climate policies we've been pushing for. **[Show Maggie and the new White House Office of Domestic Climate Policy your support: Sign a card to join us in congratulating Maggie today!](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/1559?t=6&akid=6246%2E53494%2EzwlJwS)** Thanks, Team Evergreen | [SIGN THE CARD ](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/1559?t=7&akid=6246%2E53494%2EzwlJwS)

name: Laura Loomer
subject: Where to find me . . .
body:
Our entire movement is scrambling to find a home right now as the social media purge kicks into high gear.
| | | | Friend,

[](https://em.loomered.com/ga/click/2-587068045-4281-410992-966122-5407427-4be94a43f7-d2e9243275) Our entire movement is scrambling to find a home right now as the social media purge kicks into high gear.

I guess one upside of being the first woman banned from nearly everything, is that I still know how to reach people who want to hear my message.

Before I get to how to find my real time updates, here’s the pre-order link to the book I’ve just finished writing, [**_LOOMERED: How I Became the Most Banned Woman in the World_**](https://em.loomered.com/ga/click/2-587068045-4281-410992-966122-5407427-4be94a43f7-d2e9243275).

It’s on [**pre-order now**](https://em.loomered.com/ga/click/2-587068045-4281-410992-966122-5407427-4be94a43f7-d2e9243275) and will be released May 18th – and you know nothing would irritate Big Tech more than making _[LOOMERED](https://em.loomered.com/ga/click/2-587068045-4281-410992-966122-5407427-4be94a43f7-d2e9243275)_ a best seller.

I would really appreciate it if you [**pre-order it today**](https://em.loomered.com/ga/click/2-587068045-4281-410992-966122-5407427-4be94a43f7-d2e9243275).

And with Parler down due to Amazon’s censorship, Telegram and Gab are the way to go. [Here’s my channel on Telegram](https://em.loomered.com/ga/click/2-587068045-4281-410992-966122-5407428-f4c573fb2e-d2e9243275) and [my account on Gab](https://em.loomered.com/ga/click/2-587068045-4281-410992-966122-5407429-2a2c4bb01a-d2e9243275).

I’ve been posting to Telegram for over a year now and have 30,000 subscribers.

On Gab, I have nearly 100,000 subscribers.

Prior to Parler being taken down due to censorship, I had 1.5 million followers on that platform.

While I can’t guarantee that Telegram won’t be influenced to start cracking down (and they already have to a degree), Telegram and Gab are the most stable free-speech platforms at the moment and I encourage you to join my channel and explore all the others that are going strong there.

Thanks again for all that you do and expect an email update later this week with an update on my lawsuits and the Red Flag that’s stripped my 2A rights.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

P.S. Don’t forget to [**pre-order LOOMERED here**](https://em.loomered.com/ga/click/2-587068045-4281-410992-966122-5407427-4be94a43f7-d2e9243275).

---

720 Lucerne Ave, #1465
LAKE WORTH, FL. 33460
[Unsubscribe](https://em.loomered.com/ga/unsubscribe/2-587068045-4281-410992-966122-7b079168d98543a-d2e9243275)
